# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS builder

RUN apk add --no-cache git ca-certificates tzdata

RUN adduser \
    --disabled-password \
    --gecos "" \
    --home "/nonexistent" \
    --shell "/sbin/nologin" \
    --no-create-home \
    appuser

WORKDIR /build

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download && go mod verify

COPY . .

RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build \
    -ldflags="-w -s" \
    -trimpath \
    -o /build/app .

FROM scratch

COPY --from=builder /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY --from=builder /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt /etc/ssl/certs/
COPY --from=builder /etc/passwd /etc/passwd
COPY --from=builder /etc/group /etc/group

COPY --from=builder /build/app /app

USER appuser:appuser

EXPOSE 8080

ENTRYPOINT ["/app"]
